task: Can you show me the page with the filing fee for a self-petitioned I-140 application?
final_result_response:
Now I can see the complete I-140 fee table, which includes information about self-petitioners. The table shows:

**I-140, Immigrant Petition for Alien Workers**

| Filing Category | Paper Filing Fee | Online Filing Fee |
|---|---|---|
| General Filing | $715 plus additional fees, if applicable | $665 plus additional fees, if applicable |
| **Additional Fees: Asylum Program Fee** | | |
| a. If you are a Regular Petitioner | a. $600 | a. $600 |
| b. If filing as a Nonprofit | b. $0 | b. $0 |
| c. If filing as a Small Employer or **self-petitioner** | c. $300 | c. $300 |

This is exactly the page showing the filing fee for a self-petitioned I-140. The page is currently displayed at `https://www.uscis.gov/feecalculator`. The self-petitioner falls under category "c" for the Asylum Program Fee, paying $300 (instead of $600 for regular petitioners), in addition to the base filing fee of $715 (paper) or $665 (online).

I have successfully navigated to and displayed the page with the I-140 filing fee information for self-petitioners. The page is now visible on screen showing all the relevant fee details.
